calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $800,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed March 23, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
